caption: A woman with hair styled in a high bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt while sitting in a recording studio. She is positioned in profile, looking toward the left and smiling slightly. In front of her is a professional black microphone. The background features a white wall, a black acoustic panel with a yellow border, and a screen displaying the text "ohnson" in red. A small sign above the screen reads "Employees Only". On-screen graphics appear in the lower-left and lower-right areas of the image; the left side features a logo with the word "PODCAST" and the right side displays the text "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white, accompanied by a small logo of a figure. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in the same position and expression, and there are no visible changes in the setting or the on-screen elements.
